sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7975" key="a)ndroqe/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρο-θέα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">man-goddess,</tr_> i.e. Athena. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.22</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
